div.p:
🥟 Oven Baking
From Frozen
Preheat your oven to 200°C (Fan 190°C).
Place the empanadas on a lined baking tray or grease it lightly with oil.
Bake for about 20 minutes, until the pastry is golden and crisp and the filling is piping hot.
For defrosted empanadas, reduce the time to 12 minutes.

🥟 Air Fry
From Frozen
Cook for 10–12 minutes, flipping halfway through to ensure even crispness.
For defrosted empanadas, reduce the time to 7 minutes.

p.em: ✨ Tip: Every oven and air fryer is a little different, so keep an eye on your empanadas as they cook. They're ready when they're beautifully golden and smell irresistible!

div.p:
🥟 Deep Fry
Heat oil to 170°C.
Fry for 3–4 minutes, until golden.
Drain on paper towels to remove excess oil.
